prompt: Write the opening of the community page — the first thing a new member reads.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Copy source of truth
nodes.details: Opening copy lives in i18n/CMS key community.home.opening — not hardcoded in multiple components.

nodes.label: OpeningHero component
nodes.details: Implement OpeningHero with props for title/body/cta; support empty & error fallbacks.

nodes.label: A/B variant hooks
nodes.details: Optional variant field for later tests; default single string in v1.

nodes.label: Length constraints
nodes.details: Enforce max chars for mobile layout; truncate safely server-side if CMS overflows.

nodes.label: Prose authoring OOS
nodes.details: Builder does not author the brand story — only wiring and constraints.
